title: platform-user — broadcast channels
description: This module publishes NO broadcast channels. Platform-plane events reach subscribers via the standard event bus + queue — there is no WebSocket-fed live-update surface unique to platform-user. The ops dashboard reads via HTTP polling (30s cadence) on the `/platform-users` + `/platform-users/on-call/current` endpoints. When Wave 1b `access/delegation` lands, it may add a `platform.impersonation.{platform_user_id}` channel for real-time impersonation notification — that will live in the delegation module's blueprint, not here. This file exists for uniform module shape.
notes: Foundation owns the ONE platform-wide broadcast channel (`platform.health`) for cross-module health snapshots — platform-user emits health probe results via that channel, not its own.
Notification-side transports (mail, in-app, Slack, PagerDuty) do NOT go through Reverb — those are queue-backed transport plugins registered by the notifications modules.
